info.name: Parcels App Tracking API
info.description: Universal multi-carrier shipment tracking across 1,540 carriers via the Parcels API v3 (https://parcelsapp.com/api/v3). Tracking is asynchronous: POST /shipments/tracking creates a tracking request and returns a temporary uuid (plus any cached results immediately), then GET /shipments/tracking is polled by uuid every few seconds until done is true - or pass webhookUrl to receive shipment_completed and batch_completed callbacks instead. Authentication is an apiKey from the Parcels dashboard (https://parcelsapp.com/dashboard/), sent as a query parameter or JSON body field. A keyless mock server is documented at https://parcelsapp.com/api-docs/mock/v3.

query.description: API key from the Parcels dashboard.

request.description: Returns the current subscription plan, monthly unique shipment limit, usage counter, and the UTC date the counter resets.

Creates an asynchronous tracking request. The response usually contains a temporary uuid to poll with; if every requested shipment is already cached the response is complete immediately (done true, fromCache true) with no uuid. Carriers are auto-detected.

Creates a tracking request that delivers results by webhook instead of polling. Parcels POSTs JSON WebhookPayload events (shipment_completed per shipment, then batch_completed) to the HTTPS webhookUrl; failed deliveries may be retried.

query.description: Temporary tracking request UUID returned by create tracking request. Do not pass a tracking number here.
API key from the Parcels dashboard.

request.description: Polls a tracking request by UUID. Keep polling every few seconds until done is true; completed shipments include status, origin/destination, detected carrier, and the full timeline of tracking events.
